notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed directly supports that Fang Yuan deliberately sacrificed Qi Hai Old Ancestor to trick Star Constellation Immortal Venerable into using the qi fruit resurrection method. This is a secret plan known only to Fang Yuan, not to Star Constellation. The source pointer from ch_2335_p0036 directly supports this.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
方源主动牺牲气海老祖并故意送其被俘，以复活元始仙尊为诱饵欺骗星宿仙尊，此动机由ptr_6和ptr_7直接支持，属于直接观察到的行为与一步推理。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed focuses on individual-level conflicts between Fang Yuan (方源) and various venerables (Star Constellation, Giant Sun, Spectral Soul). No collective faction/group/clan/family is identified as having a concrete stake in the seed facts. '天庭' (Heavenly Court) appears as a location/institution in relations but is not presented as an active faction with collective pressure in this chapter's seed data. The events revolve around Fang Yuan's personal schemes and individual venerable reactions. No named family, clan, shop, hall, or organization with collective stakes is present.
IF export filter quarantined 11 legacy old-schema branches.
